---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. E.g., "It's frustrating when..."

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like this to work.

**Which module does this affect?**

- [ ] Core (identity, nav, branding)
- [ ] Events
- [ ] Volunteer
- [ ] Fundraising
- [ ] News
- [ ] PTA
- [ ] Community
- [ ] Other: \_\_\_

**Who benefits?**
Parents, teachers, PTA admins, district staff, developers?

**Additional context**
Mockups, examples from other school sites, etc.
